'''Tel''' was a [[White dwarf/Legends|white dwarf]] and the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Tel Minor system/Legends|Tel Minor system]], a [[Star system/Legends|system]] within the [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]]. The star was orbited by four [[Planet/Legends|planets]], [[Tel I]], [[Tel II]], [[Tel III]], and [[Tel IV (Minor)|Tel IV]].
